summary: M4 task graph is closed after PR #82 entered origin/main at 4bee35829c9a37eff405d59cfe4af1a605434928. Lead closed the systems_architect and qa_reviewer graph threads, promoted M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 to READY, and prepared continuation into the first M4 implementation task.

tests_run.result: Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed

decisions: Closed M4-TASK-GRAPH-001 only after PR #82 entered main and CI passed.
Promoted M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 to READY as the first dependency-ready M4 implementation task.
No M4 implementation has started in this closure branch.
risks: M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 is R3 and touches authoritative simulation/protocol/test paths when started.
Scope must remain objective/knowledge substrate only; later M4 tasks own muster, supply, march, siege, UI, determinism, and stress validation.
requested_action: Commit and merge this closure branch, then start M4-CAMPAIGN-OBJECTIVES-001 on its dedicated branch with simulation_engineer writer and systems_architect reviewer.
